title: Hematoxyllin-Eosin ( HE ) Staining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dlaia","text":"This is a protocol to stain tissue with Hematoxyllin-Eosin ( HE ) Staining. We use human breast cancer tissue for running this protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Rinse slides with Aquadest for 5 minutes
Incubate Slides in Hematoxyllin Reagent ( Hematoxyllin JT Baker )
Rinse slides with running tap water
Incubate slides in bluing reagent @ 1 minutes, 5 times
Rinse slides with running tap water
Incubate slides in Eosin reagent 1 minute
Wipe excess fluid,cover the slides with cover glass
creator: Freda Halim
